task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Ford Bronco (Vehicle). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $38995.00 and wholesale is $27116.00. Product features: Rugged SUV with removable doors and roof and G.O.A.T. terrain management system. Reference: https://www.ford.com/bronco/

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Ford Bronco. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Ford Bronco. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
